finalAssistantMessages.text: I have the original `.webm` and both sampled JPG frames locally now. I’ll inspect the frames directly.
Frame 1 is visible and matches a borderline-ish anime scene, but not explicit. I’m opening the second sampled frame too.

Yes, downloaded and checked locally. Production did not have saved debug frames, so I used the sticker `fileId` from the `/spoiler` log, downloaded the original sticker, and extracted the same sampled frames.
